seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone.
new_constraint: Use at least four art-related jargons in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone. Use at least four art-related jargons in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to express my keen interest in the programming at your gallery. I have been following your exhibits for some time and deeply admire the curated selections you present.

As I plan my schedule for the coming months, I was hoping you could provide me with information regarding any upcoming exhibitions. I am particularly interested in learning more about the featured **mediums** and the overall **narrative** of your forthcoming shows.

If you have a digital catalog or a future events schedule you could share, that would be immensely helpful. I am especially curious if you will be hosting any **retrospectives** or significant pieces that lean toward [mention a general area of interest, e.g., contemporary painting, modern sculpture].

Thank you very much for your time and attention to this request. I look forward to hearing from you and potentially visiting the gallery soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Affiliation, if applicable]
[Your Phone Number]<turn|>
